title: Row over Dr. BR Ambedkar statue on Dev Sthan land: Allahabad High Court asks Collector to find solution
description: The Allahabad High Court has called for an amicable resolution to the unauthorised installation of Dr. BR Ambedkar’s statue at a Dev Sthan in Bareilly [Bhagirath And Another v State of UP and 4 Others]Justice Arun Kumar ordered the District Magistrate to constitute a committee of responsible officers, who can speak with the factions of Gangapur village to ensure that religious activities being carried out at the site are not disturbed.The Court added that the villagers, who want to install the s
